# llms.txt - Information for AI Agents
# This file describes the website structure for AI crawlers like Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini

# Website: Open Innova
# URL: https://openinnova.it

> Open Innovation Consulting & Software Platform

Open Innova helps Italian companies adopt open innovation methodologies. We provide strategic consulting and software (Innovate Suite, Collab Hub) for collaborative innovation.

## Company

**Name:** Open Innova S.r.l.
**Founded:** 2024
**Location:** Milano, Italy
**Focus:** Open innovation, strategic consulting, innovation software
**Languages:** Italian, English

## What We Do

### 1. Strategic Consulting
- Open innovation transformation
- Partner ecosystem building
- Innovation strategy
- Executive coaching
- Training & workshops

**Timeline:** 3-12 months
**Investment:** €20,000+

### 2. Software Products

#### Innovate Suite
Enterprise platform for managing open innovation processes.
- Idea management
- Partner collaboration
- Innovation portfolio
- Analytics & metrics

#### Collab Hub
Secure collaboration network for innovation partnerships.
- Partner discovery
- IP protection
- Project management
- Freemium model

## Core Concept: Open Innovation

Based on Henry Chesbrough's model:
- **Permeable R&D boundaries** — Mix internal and external ideas
- **Strategic IP sharing** — Share selectively, protect strategically
- **Ecosystem collaboration** — With startups, universities, customers
- **Accelerated innovation** — Faster time-to-market via partnerships

## Founder Team

- **Mario Rossi** — CEO, Strategy & Consulting
- **Lucia Bianchi** — CTO, Product & Platform
- **Marco Verdi** — Consulting Director
